title: ficus elastica var. karet
intro: Ficus elastica var. karet, also known as the Indian rubber tree or bouncy fig, is a variety of the more commonly known Ficus elastica plant. This plant is primarily recognized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, making it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits associated with Ficus elastica var. karet include reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and relief from fever and pain. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, often used to treat skin conditions, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems.
